The '''35th Infantry''' was a [[Regiment/Legends|regiment]] of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] that were active in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] around [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]].

==History==
In 21 BBY, the 35th Infantry were stationed on [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]] and were tasked with forcefully, but peacefully, evacuating the [[Human/Legends|Human]] colonists there. They were, at this time, led by [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] and [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone commander]] [[Levet (clone)|Levet]]. When the Human colonists refused to leave at the specified time, General Tur-Mukan and Commander Levet were forced to bring the 35th Infantry down onto the Human colonists. Many casualties were sustained on both sides. Eventually, the native [[Gurlanin]]s assisted the clones in rooting out the colonists. With the objective completed, the 35th Infantry moved on to [[Gaftikar]] to assist [[Omega Squad]] in capturing [[Eyat]]. General Tur-Mukan did not accompany them. The 35th Infantry were equipped with [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-Web heavy repeating blasters]], [[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|AT-TE walkers]] and [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/Legends|LAAT gunships]].<ref name="RC:TC" />
